name: Flowise
tagline: Build LLM apps and AI agents visually with a drag-and-drop canvas
seoTitle: Flowise: Visual Low-Code Builder for AI Agents
metaDescription: Flowise is an open-source low-code tool to build LLM apps and AI agents visually. Drag and drop nodes, then run them as an API. Install with npm or Docker.
overview: Flowise is an open-source tool for building LLM apps and AI agents without writing much code. You work on a visual canvas, dragging in nodes for models, prompts, memory, tools, and data sources, then wiring them together to form a flow.

It runs as a Node.js app with three parts in one repository: a server for the API logic, a React user interface, and a library of third-party node integrations. Once a flow is ready, you can use it through an API endpoint, embed it as a chat widget, or self-host it on your own infrastructure.
features: Visual drag-and-drop canvas for designing LLM chains and multi-step agent flows
Large library of built-in nodes for models, prompts, memory, tools, and data loaders
Turns each finished flow into an API endpoint and an embeddable chat widget
Self-host anywhere, with ready-made deployment guides for AWS, Azure, GCP, and more
Runs locally in minutes via npm or as a Docker container
Apache 2.0 licensed open-source codebase you can extend with custom nodes

gettingStarted.intro: Flowise needs Node.js 20 or newer. The fastest way to try it is the npm package, which starts a local server you open in your browser.

steps.heading: Install Flowise globally
steps.body: Install the Flowise CLI package using npm.

steps.heading: Start the app
steps.body: Launch Flowise, then open http://localhost:3000 in your browser to reach the visual builder.

steps.heading: Or run with Docker
steps.body: Prefer containers? Build the image locally and run it on port 3000.
steps.code:
docker build --no-cache -t flowise .
docker run -d --name flowise -p 3000:3000 flowise

steps.heading: Build from source for development
steps.body: To work on Flowise itself, clone the repo and use PNPM to install, build, and start the monorepo.
steps.code:
git clone https://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise.git
cd Flowise
pnpm install
pnpm build
pnpm start

useCases: Prototype a chatbot or RAG assistant over your own documents without writing backend code
Build multi-step AI agents that call tools and APIs, then expose them as an endpoint for your app
Let non-developers on a team assemble and test LLM workflows on a shared visual canvas
Self-host an internal AI app on your own cloud to keep data and keys inside your infrastructure
